title: Q&A Session for API Migration
excerpt:
I’m hosting a live Q&A about the API migration next Thursday at 12pm EST. 
It’s aimed at anyone who’s still migrating to version 2023-10 or has questions they want to discuss in realtime. 
Register here!

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m hosting a live Q&A about the API migration next Thursday at 12pm EST.

It’s aimed at anyone who’s still migrating to version 2023-10 or has questions they want to discuss in realtime.

Register here!
